headline: Goldman Sachs, Johnson & Johnson, MetLife Named Among Newsweek’s World’s Greenest Companies 2026
summary: NEW YORK, June 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Newsweek, in partnership with Plant-A Insights Group, today announced the World’s Greenest Companies 2026, recognizing the top 850 companies across 28 countries for their performance in environmental sustainability. Rising emissions, deforestation, and record-setting temperatures continue to shape a more unpredictable climate, with extreme weather becoming more common worldwide.
